title: Move a task through the full six-stage loop
description: This verifies that a user can progress a task through Plan, Build, Verify, Automate, Observe, and Learn from the task workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Advance the task through the next stage repeatedly
Verify the six-stage loop is displayed
Verify the task reaches the final Learn stage

title: Open an existing project workspace from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a user can open a registered project from the dashboard and reach its workspace.
category: View, search, and filter registered projects

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Verify the project workspace is displayed
Verify the project overview and task list are displayed

title: Complete the Plan stage and advance to Build
description: This test verifies that a task can be reviewed in Plan and approved to move into Build after the required checks are acknowledged.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Review the target file and safety-net checklist in the Plan stage
Approve the plan and advance to Build
Verify the task is now in the Build stage
Verify the Plan stage is marked complete

title: Chat with the AI developer agent in a task
description: This verifies that a user can send a message in task chat and see the conversation update in the studio.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Enter a message for the AI developer agent
Send the chat message
Verify the conversation updates with the sent message
Verify the agent reply area is displayed

title: Filter projects by search and framework
description: This verifies that a user can narrow the registered project list by searching and choosing a framework filter, then clear the search to see the list update.
category: View, search, and filter registered projects

steps.description: Navigate to /
Type a project search term into the search field
Select a framework filter
Verify the project list is narrowed to matching projects
Clear the search field
Verify the project list updates to show more projects again

title: Run the Verify and Automate pipeline from a task
description: This verifies that a user can start task execution and see the pipeline advance through the Verify and Automate stages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Start the task pipeline
Verify pipeline activity or progress is displayed
Verify the Verify and Automate stages are shown as completed or in progress

title: Open task workspace and chat with the AI developer agent
description: A user can enter a task workspace from a project and use the chat area to start a conversation with the AI developer agent.
category: View project overview and task list

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open a task workspace from the task list
Enter a message in the task chat
Send the chat message
Verify the conversation appears in the chat thread

title: Complete the Build stage and advance to Verify
description: This test verifies that a user can copy the AI prompter template, mark code written, and move the task into Verify.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Copy the AI prompter template
Mark code written and advance to Verify
Verify the task is now in the Verify stage
Verify the Build stage is marked complete

title: Navigate from a project workspace to the task studio
description: This verifies that a user can open a project workspace, create a task, and enter the task studio for that task.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Create a new task for the project
Open the created task
Verify the task studio is displayed
Verify the task workspace shows the task context and controls

title: Open a task workspace from the project task list
description: A user can open an individual task from the project workspace and enter the task studio.
category: View project overview and task list

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Switch to the Tasks view
Open a task workspace from the task list
Verify the task workspace is displayed

title: Open a task workspace from the project page
description: This verifies that a user can move from the project overview into the full task workspace for deeper execution.
category: Walk through the 6-stage loop from the project page

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Verify the task workspace is displayed
Verify the task context and execution controls are visible

title: View live execution logs while a task runs
description: This verifies that a user can observe live task execution logs in the studio while the pipeline is active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Start task execution
Verify live execution logs are displayed
Verify log output updates while the task is running

title: Review project overview and git information
description: A user can load a project workspace and see the project header together with its git metadata.
category: View project overview and task list

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Verify the project header is displayed
Verify git information is displayed

title: Send a direct chat message to the AI developer agent
description: This verifies that a user can send a message in task chat and see the assistant respond with visible conversation output.
category: Chat with the AI developer agent or bridge to an IDE agent

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Type a short chat message into the conversation field
Send the message
Verify the assistant response is displayed
Verify live execution logs are displayed

title: Run verification and advance to Automate
description: This test verifies that a user can choose a verification tool, execute verification, and progress from Verify into Automate.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Choose a verification tool
Execute verification
Advance to Automate
Verify the task is now in the Automate stage
Verify verification completion is reflected in the stage status

title: Create a task with target files and review the risk preview
description: This verifies that a user can create a task with target files and review the generated risk-tier preview before entering the studio.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Create a new task
Fill in a task title
Add target files for the task
Continue to the task preview
Verify a risk-tier preview is displayed
Verify the task can be entered from the preview

title: Create a new task and see it added to the list
description: A user can submit a valid new task from a project workspace and see it appear in the task list after the modal closes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open the create task flow
Fill in a task title
Add one or more target files
Submit the task form
Verify the new task appears in the task list

title: Run the Verify and Automate pipeline to completion
description: This verifies that a user can start automated checks and see the checklist progress to a completed success or failure result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Run the checks pipeline
Verify the step checklist is displayed
Verify a final pipeline result banner is displayed

title: Run automation checks and advance to Observe
description: This test verifies that a user can run lint or build checks, confirm CI tests passed, and move into Observe.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Run a lint or build check
Mark CI tests passed and advance to Observe
Verify the task is now in the Observe stage
Verify automation check completion is reflected in the stage status

title: Register an existing local project
description: This verifies that a user can register an existing local codebase and see it appear in the project list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the existing project registration flow
Fill in a project name
Fill in an absolute directory path
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new project appears in the project list

title: Bootstrap a new project from a template
description: This verifies that a user can start a new project scaffold from a template and see it added to the dashboard when complete.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the new project bootstrap flow
Fill in a project name
Fill in an absolute directory path
Select a template
Submit the bootstrap form
Verify scaffold progress or completion feedback is visible
Verify the new project appears in the project list

title: Use the project workspace to reach the task list and stage loop
description: This verifies that a user can open a project overview, view its task list, and continue into the loop-based task workflow from the same workspace.
category: Walk through the 6-stage loop from the project page

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Verify the project overview is displayed
Verify the task list is displayed
Open a task in Studio
Verify the task stage workspace is displayed

title: Watch live execution logs update during task actions
description: This test verifies that task actions produce visible log updates in the live terminal so users can monitor execution progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Complete a stage action that produces new execution output
Verify the live log terminal updates with new entries
Verify the log buffer contains recent task activity

title: Add a new AI agent to the roster
description: Verifies that a user can create a new AI agent with role, model, skills, and system instructions and see it added to the roster.
category: List, add, edit, and delete AI agents

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Open the add-agent flow
Fill in the agent name field with a unique name
Fill in the agent role field with a valid role
Fill in the model field with a valid model engine
Fill in the skills field with a relevant skill set
Fill in the system instructions field with a useful prompt
Submit the agent form
Verify the new agent appears in the roster

title: Commit or publish changes from the task studio
description: This verifies that a user can use the studio title bar action to commit or publish task changes and see the action complete.
category: Task studio commit history and publishing

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Use the studio title bar action to commit or publish changes
Verify a commit or publish confirmation is visible
Verify the task reflects that changes were saved or published

title: Switch between Studio and Tasks views
description: A user can switch between the Studio and Tasks tabs in a project workspace and see the task list view appear.
category: View project overview and task list

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Switch to the Tasks view
Verify the task list is displayed

title: Create and publish a commit from Observe
description: This test verifies that a user can review git information, enter a commit message, and publish changes from the task workspace.
category: Live preview, commit, and publish from the Studio title bar

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Review the git branch and diff in the Observe stage
Enter a commit message
Publish the changes
Verify a commit action completes successfully
Verify commit history reflects the new commit

title: Edit an existing AI agent configuration
description: Verifies that a user can update an existing agent's details and save the changes to the roster.
category: List, add, edit, and delete AI agents

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Edit an existing agent's name
Edit the existing agent's role
Edit the existing agent's model
Edit the existing agent's skills
Edit the existing agent's system instructions
Save the agent configuration
Verify the updated agent details are shown in the roster

title: Register a project with preview URL and template metadata
description: This verifies that a user can register an existing project with optional preview and template details and then see the project listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the existing project registration flow
Fill in a project name
Fill in an absolute directory path
Fill in a preview URL
Select a template
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the registered project appears in the project list

title: Delegate a task to the AI Agent Team
description: This verifies that a user can start delegated multi-turn collaboration from task chat and see the conversation stream begin.
category: Chat with the AI developer agent or bridge to an IDE agent

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Delegate the task to the AI Agent Team
Verify the collaboration stream is displayed
Verify a new assistant message or activity entry appears

title: Use chat delegation and bridge controls from a task
description: This test verifies that a user can return from agent management to a task and use direct chat, delegation, or bridge state controls in the studio.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Return to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Send a chat message to the AI developer agent
Delegate the task to the AI Agent Team
Toggle the IDE Agent Bridge pending state
Verify the chat thread shows the new agent response or message entry
Verify the delegation or bridge state is visible in the task workspace

title: Search and filter tasks in a project workspace
description: A user can search tasks and apply a status filter in the Tasks view to narrow the visible task list.
category: View project overview and task list

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Switch to the Tasks view
Enter a search term in the task search field
Select a task status filter
Verify the task list is filtered

title: Save a project API key and manage agent settings
description: This test verifies that a user can open the AI Developer Team page, save a local provider API key, and update an agent configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Fill in the local provider API key field with a valid value
Save the configuration
Update an agent setting
Save the agent configuration
Verify the API key configuration is saved
Verify the agent roster reflects the updated configuration

title: View recent commit history in a task workspace
description: Verifies that a user can open a task workspace and inspect the list of recent commits with their change summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Verify recent commit history is displayed
Verify commit change summaries are displayed

title: View task commit history and revert a change
description: This verifies that a user can open commit history for a task and revert a selected change from the task workspace.
category: Task studio commit history and publishing

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Open the task commit history
Revert a selected commit
Verify the commit history is displayed
Verify the task reflects that a revert occurred

title: Switch task chat into bridge waiting mode and cancel it
description: This verifies that enabling IDE Agent Bridge shows the waiting state and that the user can cancel the pending bridge request.
category: Chat with the AI developer agent or bridge to an IDE agent

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Enable IDE Agent Bridge mode
Verify the waiting banner is displayed
Cancel the bridge request
Verify the waiting banner is removed

title: Save an API key in the AI developer team page
description: This verifies that a user can open the agents page, save a local AI provider API key, and see it persist in the interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Fill in the API key field
Save the configuration
Verify a saved confirmation is visible
Verify the API key is shown as stored

title: Revert a task workspace to a prior commit
description: Verifies that a user can select an earlier commit to revert the workspace and complete the confirmation prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Click the revert control for a prior commit
Confirm the revert prompt
Verify the workspace shows the reverted commit as the current state

title: Delete an AI agent from the roster
description: Verifies that a user can remove an existing agent after confirming the deletion prompt.
category: List, add, edit, and delete AI agents

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Delete an existing agent
Confirm the deletion prompt
Verify the agent no longer appears in the roster

title: Update an agent configuration and save it
description: This verifies that a user can edit an AI developer agent configuration on the agents page and persist the change with Save Config.

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Modify an agent configuration field
Toggle an agent skill setting
Save the configuration
Verify the updated agent configuration is visible
Verify the saved skill state is reflected after saving

title: Open and use the live preview
description: This test verifies that a user can switch to the Preview tab and see the project rendered inside the live preview area.
category: Live preview, commit, and publish from the Studio title bar

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Switch to the Preview tab
Reload the preview view
Verify the live preview is displayed
Verify the project content is visible inside the preview area

title: Save an API key locally
description: Verifies that a user can enter an AI provider API key on the agents page and receive a local save confirmation.
category: Configure the AI provider API key

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Fill in the API key field with a valid key value
Save the API key
Verify a local save confirmation is visible

title: Use the project workspace tabs to switch between Studio and Tasks
description: This verifies that a user can switch between the workspace Studio and Tasks views without losing access to the project context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Switch to the Tasks view
Switch back to the Studio view
Verify both workspace tabs are available
Verify the project context remains visible after switching

title: View task execution logs during an active session
description: This verifies that a user can open a task and see live execution logs as part of the normal development workflow.
category: Chat with the AI developer agent or bridge to an IDE agent

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project workspace
Open a task in Studio
Verify execution logs are displayed
Verify recent activity entries are visible

title: Generate a system prompt from role and skills
description: Verifies that a user can auto-generate system instructions from an agent role and skills before creating the agent.
category: List, add, edit, and delete AI agents

steps.description: Navigate to /agents
Open the add-agent flow
Fill in the agent role field with a valid role
Fill in the skills field with a relevant skill set
Generate a prompt from the role and skills
Verify the system instructions field is populated
Verify the generated prompt is usable for submission

title: Copy the current log buffer
description: This test verifies that a user can copy the visible execution log buffer for sharing or debugging.

steps.description: Navigate to /[projectId]/tasks/[taskId]
Wait for the log terminal to display execution output
Copy the logs
Verify a copy confirmation is visible
Verify the log buffer remains visible

title: Delegate a task to the AI agent team from the studio
description: This verifies that a user can delegate work from a task workspace to the AI agent team and see the delegation state in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Choose to delegate the task to the AI agent team
Verify delegation state is visible
Verify the task remains open in the studio

title: Show validation when required project registration fields are missing
description: This verifies that the registration form blocks submission until required project name and absolute path fields are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the existing project registration flow
Submit the form without filling required fields
Verify validation errors are visible
Fill in the required project name and absolute directory path
Submit the registration form
Verify the form accepts the valid input

title: Manage the IDE agent bridge pending state
description: This verifies that a user can see the IDE bridge pending state in a task and cancel the request from the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a project card to open its workspace
Open an existing task
Initiate the IDE agent bridge flow
Verify a bridge pending state is visible
Cancel the bridge request
Verify the pending state is cleared

title: Unregister a project from the dashboard
description: A user can remove a registered project from the dashboard and see it disappear after confirming the browser prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the remove control on a project card
Confirm the browser prompt
Verify the project is removed from the list
